After defeating Clair, you've decided to: After defeating Clair, you've decided to take on the Indigo League.
After a long and perilous journey, you e: After a long and perilous journey, you enter the building and begin the challenge.
Waiting for you in the first room is Wil: Waiting for you in the first room is Will. He says...
\"Welcome to Pokémon League, \\PN. Allow: "Welcome to Pokémon League, \PN. Allow me to introduce myself. I am Will.
I have trained all around the world, mak: I have trained all around the world, making my Psychic Pokémon powerful.
And, at last, I've been accepted into th: And, at last, I've been accepted into the Elite Four. I can only keep getting better! Losing is not an option!"
\"WILL: Even though I was defeated, I wo: "WILL: Even though I was defeated, I won't change my course. I will continue battling until I stand above all Trainers! Now, \PN.
Move on and experience the true ferocity: Move on and experience the true ferocity of the Elite Four."
BARBARA: Would you like to continue, or: BARBARA: Would you like to continue, or take a break?
BARBARA: Okay, we'll pick up where we le: BARBARA: Okay, we'll pick up where we left off whenever you're ready.
BARBARA: After defeating Will, you moved: BARBARA: After defeating Will, you moved onto the next room. Koga waits for you there.
\"KOGA: Fwahahahaha! I am Koga of the El: "KOGA: Fwahahahaha! I am Koga of the Elite Four. I live in shadows, a ninja! My intricate style will confound and destroy you!
Confusion, sleep, poison... Prepare to b: Confusion, sleep, poison... Prepare to be the victim of my sinister technique!
Fwahahahaha! Pokémon is not merely about: Fwahahahaha! Pokémon is not merely about brute force--you shall see soon enough!"
\"KOGA: I subjected you to everything I: "KOGA: I subjected you to everything I could muster. But my efforts failed. I must hone my skills. Go on to the next room, and put your abilities to test!"
BARBARA: After you defeated Koga, you mo: BARBARA: After you defeated Koga, you move onto the next room where Bruno is waiting for you.
\"BRUNO: I am Bruno of the Elite Four. I: "BRUNO: I am Bruno of the Elite Four. I always train to the extreme because I believe in our potential.
That is how we became strong. Can you wi: That is how we became strong. Can you withstand our power? Hm? I see no fear in you.
You look determined. Perfect for battle!: You look determined. Perfect for battle! Ready, \PN? You will bow down to our overwhelming power! Hoo hah!"
\"BRUNO: Having lost, I have no right to: "BRUNO: Having lost, I have no right to say anything... Go face your next challenge!"
BARBARA: After defeating Bruno, you move: BARBARA: After defeating Bruno, you move onto the next room with Karen.
\"KAREN: I am Karen of the Elite Four. Y: "KAREN: I am Karen of the Elite Four.  You're \PN? How amusing. I love dark-type Pokémon.
I find their wild, tough image to be so: I find their wild, tough image to be so appealing.  And they're so strong. Think you can take them?  Just try to entertain me. Let's go."
\"KAREN: Strong Pokémon. Weak Pokémon. T: "KAREN: Strong Pokémon. Weak Pokémon. That is only the selfish perception of people.
Truly skilled trainers should try to win: Truly skilled trainers should try to win with their favorites. I like your style. You understand what's important.
Go on -- the Champion is waiting.\": Go on -- the Champion is waiting."
BARBARA: After defeating Karen, you move: BARBARA: After defeating Karen, you move onto the final challenge, Lance. The Champion.
\"LANCE: I've been waiting for you. \\PN: "LANCE: I've been waiting for you. \PN! I knew that you, with your skills, would eventually reach me here. There's no need for words now.
We will battle to determine who is the s: We will battle to determine who is the stronger of the two of us. As the most powerful trainer and as the Pokémon League Champion... I,\| Lance the dragon master, accept your challenge!"
\"LANCE: ...Whew. You have become truly: "LANCE: ...Whew. You have become truly powerful, \PN. Your Pokémon have responded to your strong and upstanding nature.
As a trainer, you will continue to grow: As a trainer, you will continue to grow strong with your Pokémon."
BARBARA: I... I can't believe it! You di: BARBARA: I... I can't believe it! You did it! You're amazing \PN!
Because of your efforts, we were able to: Because of your efforts, we were able to compile a humongous amount of data.
As a result, we were able to make this. Please take it.
BARBARA: But that's not all! Please take: BARBARA: But that's not all! Please take this as well!

It's going well, but I need more partici: It's going well, but I need more participants. Oh well.
This is it! I'm going to Grand Dream Cit: This is it! I'm going to Grand Dream City to become a rich author!
Please buy my books when they come out!: Please buy my books when they come out!
I work at the Poké Ball factory at the e: I work at the Poké Ball factory at the edge of town.
